tools.name: get_user_profile_schema
tools.description:
Return the strict standard schema for user_profile.

    IMPORTANT:
    - Only these standard UserProfile fields are allowed.
    - No alias mapping is supported.
    - city is NOT a profile field.
    - checkin_date / checkout_date are NOT profile fields.
    - Numeric budget constraints usually be

tools.name: start_session
tools.description:
Create or replace a session.

    PURPOSE:
    - Initialize conversation state
    - Optionally store stable user profile fields

    DO:
    - pass stable or semi-stable profile information in user_profile
    - pass preferred_language if known
    - call this before other hotel-related tools

tools.name: get_session_state
tools.description: Get a compact summary of the current session state.

tools.name: clear_session
tools.description: Clear the entire session.

tools.name: list_sessions
tools.description:
List all in-memory session summaries.
    Useful for debugging only.

tools.name: update_user_profile
tools.description:
Update session.user_profile using standard UserProfile fields only.

    USE THIS WHEN:
    - the caller already has structured profile fields

    DO NOT PUT HERE:
    - city
    - checkin_date
    - checkout_date
    - raw numeric search constraints that belong in search_hotels

    Preferred prof

tools.name: update_user_profile_from_model
tools.description:
Preferred path for profile extraction.

    The external model should:
    - read the user's natural language message
    - decide which STANDARD UserProfile fields are supported by evidence
    - send ONLY those fields here

    HARD RULES:
    - only standard UserProfile fields are allowed
    - d

tools.name: extract_user_profile_from_text
tools.description:
Lightweight fallback extraction from raw text.

    This is mainly for debugging and fallback use.
    It is NOT the preferred production path.
    Preferred production path:
    - external model understands raw text
    - external model outputs standard UserProfile fields
    - call update_user_pro

tools.name: ingest_user_message
tools.description:
Store raw user message into session context.

    IMPORTANT:
    This tool is no longer the main profile extraction path.

    RECOMMENDED USE:
    - store raw user text for context
    - let the external model decide profile fields
    - then call update_user_profile_from_model(...)

    DEFAULT BE

tools.name: normalize_stay_dates
tools.description:
Parse stay dates without using session state.

    user_profile here is optional and only accepts standard profile fields.
    city is not required here.

tools.name: update_stay_dates
tools.description:
Update session stay dates.

    USE THIS TOOL FOR:
    - check-in date
    - check-out date
    - nights-based date calculation

    DO NOT:
    - do NOT put dates inside user_profile
    - do NOT try to pass dates through start_session user_profile

tools.name: search_hotels
tools.description:
Search and recommend hotels.

    USE THIS TOOL FOR:
    - city-based hotel search
    - main search intent
    - direct numeric search constraints such as price_min / price_max
    - explicit room or amenity filters

    IMPORTANT:
    - city MUST be passed here, not inside user_profile
    - user_

tools.name: get_hotel_details
tools.description:
Get detailed information for a hotel.

    Use this after search_hotels when the user asks for more details
    about a recommended option.

tools.name: check_stay_price
tools.description:
Check live stay price for a previously recommended hotel.

    REQUIREMENT:
    - update_stay_dates must already have been called

tools.name: get_booking_offers
tools.description:
Get available hotel offers for the current session dates.

    REQUIREMENT:
    - update_stay_dates should already be set
    - hotel should come from previous search results

tools.name: search_restaurants_near_hotel
tools.description: Search restaurants near a hotel.

tools.name: search_activities_in_city
tools.description:
Search activities in a city.

    If city is omitted, use session.city from prior hotel search.

tools.name: search_flight_content
tools.description: Search airline-related content.

tools.name: search_homestays_in_city
tools.description:
Search homestays in a city.

    If city is omitted, use session.city from prior hotel search.

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Health check for the MCP server.

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "start_session" is 1006 chars, far longer than this server's median (156). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Create or replace a session. PURPOSE: - Initialize conversation state - Optionally store stable user profile fields DO: - pass stable or semi-stable profile inf…

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "update_user_profile_from_model" is 921 chars, far longer than this server's median (156). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Preferred path for profile extraction. The external model should: - read the user's natural language message - decide which STANDARD UserProfile fields are supp…

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: update_user_profile_from_model · Public sink: update_user_profile_from_model · Destructive: ingest_user_message.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: update_user_profile_from_model · Public sink: update_user_profile_from_model · Destructive: ingest_user_message

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
